_comment.purpose: Manual verdicts that survive re-scrapes. The classifier (pipeline/classify.js) applies these FIRST, before any rule. An override always wins.
_comment.matching: Each entry has a `match` object. The classifier tries `feature_ids` (exact dedupe-key match) first; if none match it falls back to `name_regex` (case-insensitive, tested against the place name). Use feature_ids for precision and name_regex as a durable fallback in case a place's feature ID changes between scrapes.
_comment.status_vocabulary: walk_in_confirmed | walk_in_unverified | remittance_first | online_only | noise. (The classifier also emits `unknown`, but that is never set via override.)
_comment.walk_in_confirmed_rule: ONLY set status=walk_in_confirmed when `evidence` contains a real verification (website 'how it works' language confirming an in-person cash counter, or a logged phone call). Never infer it from category/address alone.

fields.website: Official website URL, shown on the shop page (opens in new tab).
fields.live_rates_url: URL of the shop's own live/realtime rates page. Renders as a 'Live rates' badge linking out. Only set when the page genuinely shows current rates.
fields.match.name_regex: Case-insensitive regex string tested against place name. Fallback when feature_ids miss.
fields.match.feature_ids: Array of Google Maps feature IDs (0x..:0x..) this verdict applies to. Primary match key.
fields.status: One of the status vocabulary values.
fields.evidence: Human-readable proof string. Required for walk_in_confirmed; recommended for all.
fields.verified_phone: Template for a future phone-call verdict Kim can fill in: {date: 'YYYY-MM-DD', answer: 'yes'|'no'|'no_answer'}. Leave date/answer null until a call is made. When answer='yes' for cash walk-in, promote status to walk_in_confirmed and copy the call into evidence.

(verified 2026-06-15)
overrides.note: Multi-service storefront: currency exchange at counter plus Western Union/RIA money transfer, cheque cashing, income tax filing. Suite #4 (ground-floor retail). forex-rates page shows indicative-only rates ("call us directly" for live rates), so no genuine live-rates page. Could not access Google/Yelp review counts or recency (Yelp 403); confirmation rests on own website.

overrides.evidence: Real operating site moneymoneycenter.com (same phone 905-276-6639 / 3355 Hurontario St) Services page lists 'Currency Exchange / Money Transfer / Payday Loans / Cashing Cheque'; home page: 'We provide Foreign Money Exchange Services and Cheque Cashing... transfer money around the world to loved ones for cash pickup or deposit directly into their bank account.' No walk-in/cash-counter wording, no rates page, and zero Google/YellowPages reviews found, so in-person cash FX could not be confirmed. The 'moneymoneyexchange.com' domain is a parked ParkLogic redirect, not the live site. (verified 2026-06-15)
overrides.note: Multi-service storefront (Unit #3, L5A 4E7) offering currency exchange, money transfer/remittance, payday loans, and cheque cashing; walk-in hours posted (Mon-Fri, Sat). Profile is remittance/cheque-cashing heavy rather than a dedicated cash-FX counter. moneymoneyexchange.com is dead/parked; live brand is 'Money Money Center'. A FINTRAC MSB reg exists under 'Fairview Assessment Inc.' (M12904797) at this unit, but no FX-Ontario reg and no review evidence of in-person cash exchange.

overrides.evidence: Orbit Money (orbitmoney.com) is a real multi-branch Canadian "currency exchange and international money transfer" firm with 12+ physical stores; the 377 Burnhamthorpe Rd E Unit#37 site is FINTRAC-registered, Google-categorized "Currency exchange service" with retail hours (Mon-Fri 10-6, Sat 10-4) and is also a MoneyGram agent. Search snippets say to "bring valid identification and any cash" when visiting, but the official site is JS-rendered (returned only its title) and the wheree.com reviews page was HTTP 403, so I could not get direct datable review evidence of in-person cash exchange. (searched orbitmoney.com locations/faqs/blog, infobel, wheree, MoneyGram; no solid walk-in confirmation, verified 2026-06-15)
overrides.note: Unit #37 retail plaza storefront, Mon-Fri 10-6 / Sat 10-4. Brand blends currency exchange with remittance (tagline "Fast & Secure Money Transfer", also a MoneyGram agent). Google listing shows 5.0 with no visible review count, so could not meet the high bar for walk_in_confirmed.

overrides.evidence: primeforexservices.com (own site): homepage references the "branch forex counter" and states branches accept cash, cheque and e-transfer; Branches page lists the Mississauga branch at "488 Eglinton Avenue West Unit# 10, Mississauga, ON L5R 0G2" with walk-in hours Mon-Fri 9:00-18:00 and Sat 11:00-16:00; homepage live converter "Rates updated on June 15, 2026 at 6:27 PM". FINTRAC MSB registered. (verified 2026-06-15)
overrides.note: Multi-branch retail FX chain (Mississauga, Calgary, Burnaby). Mississauga branch at 488 Eglinton Ave W Unit 10, ground-floor retail unit. Site shows live currency converter/rate card on homepage. Also offers money transfer to 140+ countries, but currency exchange at the counter is a core walk-in service. No separate clean live-rates URL found; converter is embedded on homepage.

overrides.evidence: sultanexchange.com lists a single retail address '2395 Cawthra Road, Unit 101 Mississauga' with storefront hours (Mon-Fri 10:00-18:00, Sat 11:30-16:30) and publishes live rates ('Client Buys (Pays Canadian) 1.4202' USD), and aggregated reviews praise in-person service ('slightly better than that at BMO', 'better rates than all banks'); but the site uses no explicit walk-in/cash-counter language and I found no datable 10+ recent reviews describing cash exchange (Yelp returned 403). (verified 2026-06-15)
overrides.note: Real FX/remittance storefront in Unit 101 (street-level retail) on Cawthra Rd, in business since ~2005, FINTRAC MSB + BBB accredited; also does money transfers and gold buy/sell. Retail hours and bank-rate-comparison reviews strongly suggest a walk-in cash counter, but no own-site cash/walk-in statement and no datable recent (last 1-2 mo) review burst, so not raised to walk_in_confirmed.

overrides.evidence: Square One official mall directory (shopsquareone.com / sq1district.com) lists "TCX Currency Exchange," Level 1 near Walmart, phone 905-279-4475, hours Mon-Sat 10AM-9PM / Sun 11AM-7PM, described "Over 30 years of business in Foreign Exchange! overrides.note: TCX Travelers brand storefront inside Square One Shopping Centre (Unit 1-847), a major Mississauga mall. Hybrid model: walk-in counter exchange of 50+ currencies plus advance 'Click & Collect' pickup-and-pay-in-store. No live rates published on site.
